metadata.title: Custom constellation line-figure graph database, JingHeng custom v2 cleaned
metadata.source_family: IAU constellation charts produced with Sky & Telescope; Alan MacRobert green line patterns; cross-checked with Stellarium western_SnT skyculture index.json
metadata.important_note: IAU formally defines constellation boundary regions, not one official stick-figure graph. These are custom line figures in IAU/S&T chart style represented as HIP-node graph paths.
metadata.path_rule: Each path is an ordered polyline. Adjacent HIP numbers form edges. Optional leading style token applies to that polyline.
metadata.edge_rule: Edges are expanded from adjacent HIP pairs. Self-loops caused by repeated adjacent HIPs are skipped in the edge list but preserved in original_paths.
metadata.derived_from: Original IAU/Sky & Telescope green-line extraction; modified according to user-supplied constellation adjustments on 2026-06-30.
metadata.custom_policy: Paths are custom aesthetic line-art choices, not official IAU stick figures.
assumptions: Cancer uses χ Cnc, HIP 40843, connected from γ Cnc, HIP 42806.
Cepheus triangle is Errai–ι Cep–β Cep; square is β Cep–Alderamin–λ Cep–ι Cep.
Scorpius has Antares as common base for β, δ, π, and the body/tail chain; ρ and ν are not used.
Auriga is only a six-star loop.
Taurus and Sagittarius keep only the major graph.
Disconnected components are allowed when the line figure naturally has them.
metadata.custom_change_summary: Enforced requested Leo/Orion/Hercules/Apus/Hydrus/Corona Australis/Ophiuchus/Boötes/Lepus/Ara edits and paired the website fetch URL with a cache-busting version.
metadata.source_for_site: Used as the source of truth for iloveastro Sky Map constellation lines.

render_policy.source: constellation_lines.json original HIP edges cleaned from original_paths
render_policy.magnitude: Line endpoints are independent of the Sky Map magnitude slider; ordinary stars still obey the slider.
render_policy.missing_hip_policy: Warn to browser developer console only.
render_policy.line_style_policy: Website ignores bold/normal/thin and draws all constellation lines uniformly.

metadata.edge_count_meaning: total_edges_per_constellation_sum counts deduplicated undirected edges within each constellation; total_edges_across_constellations counts unique undirected HIP pairs across the full database.

constellations.name: Andromeda
constellations.custom_note: Four-star Andromeda: α–δ–β–γ.

constellations.name: Apus
constellations.custom_note: Apus simplified to α–δ–β–γ.

constellations.name: Aquila
constellations.custom_note: Only α β γ δ ζ θ λ retained; δ connects to α; removed θ–λ–ζ.

constellations.name: Ara
constellations.custom_note: Removed α Ara–ζ Ara; added α Ara–ε Ara–ζ Ara.

constellations.name: Auriga
constellations.custom_note: Only a six-star loop retained; δ and branch lines removed.

constellations.name: Bootes
constellations.custom_note: Changed ε–β to ε–δ–β.

constellations.name: Cepheus
constellations.custom_note: Triangle = Errai–ι–β; square = β–Alderamin–λ–ι.

constellations.name: Cancer
constellations.custom_note: χ Cnc connected from γ Cnc.

constellations.name: Corona Australis
constellations.custom_note: Corona Australis set to ε–γ–α–β–δ–ζ–η; δ–ε disconnected.

constellations.name: Corvus
constellations.custom_note: α Crv removed.

constellations.name: Cygnus
constellations.custom_note: Only ζ–ε–γ–δ–κ wings and Deneb–γ–η–β swan/body retained.

constellations.name: Hercules
constellations.custom_note: Removed the β Her–δ Her connection.

constellations.name: Hydrus
constellations.custom_note: Hydrus simplified to α–β–γ only.

constellations.name: Leo
constellations.custom_note: Removed ε Leo–η Leo; retained the rest of the Leo figure.

constellations.name: Lepus
constellations.custom_note: Removed α Lep–ε Lep; ensured μ Lep–κ Lep is connected.

constellations.name: Mensa
constellations.custom_note: Mensa changed to α–β–γ.

constellations.name: Microscopium
constellations.custom_note: Microscopium changed to α–γ–ε.

constellations.name: Norma
constellations.custom_note: δ Nor removed; remaining figure contracted to triangle.

constellations.name: Ophiuchus
constellations.custom_note: Ophiuchus set to α–β–η–ζ–ν–ε–δ–κ; removed γ and extra ν/kappa/zeta branch connections.

constellations.name: Orion
constellations.custom_note: Removed ξ Ori and χ² Ori from the arm/branch figure.

constellations.name: Scorpius
constellations.custom_note: Antares is the fork base to β, δ, π, and the body/tail chain. ρ and ν are not used.

constellations.name: Sagittarius
constellations.custom_note: Only the major Sagittarius graph retained; minor detached/extra paths removed.

constellations.name: Taurus
constellations.custom_note: Only the major Taurus graph retained; omicron/minor detached strokes removed.
